task_description: Build a world-class HFT scalping system for XAUUSD 1-minute chart. Analyze 6M ticks of real broker data, backtest multiple strategies, optimize parameters, and produce the highest PnL strategy with minimal drawdown as a production MQL5 EA.

verification.summary: Full pipeline runs successfully: data analysis (5.9s), strategy backtesting (93.8s), ensemble comparison completed. EA is 685 lines of valid MQL5 with all safety features. OrderFlow strategy achieved $2,519 PnL (252% return) with Sharpe 3.9. Ensemble achieved $430 PnL with 80% win rate and only 10.5% max drawdown - best risk-adjusted returns. All output files generated correctly.
